items.name: Luffy +
items.description:
The future pirate king / joy boy himself! Due to Roblox changing the head attachment points on the Riley body, you now have to use the head from this bundle: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/600400/Body-For-Layered-Clothing
For the arms and torso at the very least make sure to use this FREE character bundle by Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/979/Base-Body-Riley

Get the rest of the outfit!

Head: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/18524887866/Luffy-Face-Time-Skip-R-Thro

Pants: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/18524991262/Luffy-Pants-Time-Skip-R-Thro

Strawhat Back bling: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/18977776994/Luffy-Strawhat

Settings: Body Type: 100% Height: 95% Width: 100% Head: 95% Proportions: 0%

FOR GEAR 5 VERSION START HERE: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/18888565380/Gear-5-Luffy-Shirt
